# LOCK

> Pre-booking proof and risk-reduction tool for the live music industry.
> Helps demand-side buyers — booking managers, promoters, event producers, planners, private and corporate clients (מזמיני הופעות) — evaluate an unfamiliar artist via standardized, method-labeled evidence before they risk their name.
> Formerly known as GIGPROOF, rebranded to LOCK in 2026 — same product, same team.

## What LOCK is

LOCK is a verification system for independent artists seeking to prove their live performance track record to booking managers. It is NOT a booking marketplace, NOT an EPK generator, NOT a guarantee of any outcome, and NOT a comparison or ranking tool.

## Three actors

- **Artist (אמן)** — builds and controls their own proof. Pays for the service. Uses the private Artist Radar workspace.
- **Booking Manager (מזמין הופעות)** — the demand side: venue/club booker, festival programmer, promoter, talent buyer, or a private/corporate event client. Evaluates artists before booking. Free access. Views the public Passport. (Distinct from an אמרגן — the artist-side agent/management office, which manages a roster inside LOCK.)
- **Producer (מפיק)** — confirms a single claim via a bounded magic link. No account required.

These roles are distinct. Booking manager ≠ producer ≠ artist agent. They are never merged.

## Two surfaces

- **Artist Radar** — private workspace for the artist. Shows evidence states, gaps, and one next action per dimension. Never visible to outsiders.
- **Bookability Passport** — public, buyer-facing document. Shows verified strengths only. Method-labeled. WhatsApp-scannable. Never shows gaps, weaknesses, or unverified claims.

## Verification methodology

Every claim on a Passport carries a method label and reviewed date. Method labels:
- PRODUCER-CONFIRMED — strongest. A producer verified via magic link.
- TICKET EXPORT · REVIEWED — document verified by the LOCK team.
- PLATFORM DATA · REVIEWED — contextual data, not draw evidence.
- SELF-REPORTED · UNVERIFIED — internal only, never public.

## What LOCK does not do

- No score, rating, ranking, or prediction
- No exact headcount (audience draw shown as a band: e.g. 70–150)
- No artist-vs-artist comparison
- No booking guarantee
- No automated matching or recommendation engine (future feature, not live)
- No score-like visual (no gauge, no fill bar, no polygon/spider chart, no progress ring)

## Pages

- https://lock.show/ — Homepage
- https://lock.show/artists — For artists (אמן): how to build a Passport
- https://lock.show/bookers — For booking managers (מזמיני הופעות): how to read a Passport
- https://lock.show/producers — For producers (מפיק): the magic-link confirmation flow
- https://lock.show/managers — For artist managers/agencies (משרד אמרגנות): roster beta signup
- https://lock.show/production — For production offices (משרד הפקה): production beta signup
- https://lock.show/passport/demo — A sample Passport showing verified evidence
- https://lock.show/how-it-works — Three players, seven steps
- https://lock.show/methodology — How evidence is verified; method labels explained
- (Pricing page temporarily unpublished during the closed beta — access is by arrangement; booking managers always free)
- https://lock.show/radar — The Artist Radar feature explained
- https://lock.show/faq — Frequently asked questions
- https://lock.show/contact — Contact form and information

Not indexed for AI retrieval: https://lock.show/app/* (the product application
itself — private tool screens and auth-walled workspace, not marketing or
reference content).

## Current stage

Closed beta, 2026. Manual payment (Bit/bank transfer). No automated billing yet.

## Language

English and Hebrew (עברית). Hebrew copy is authored native-first, not translated from English.

## Domain

https://lock.show — marketing site
https://app.lock.show — artist and operator app (not indexed here)
